name: Guangdong DaZhi Environmental Protection Technology Incorporated Company
summary: Guangdong DaZhi Environmental Protection Technology Incorporated Company engages in the research, production, sale, application, and servicing of surface engineering chemicals in China. It offers electroplating additives, intermediates, electronic chemicals, paint additives, polyethylene carbonate polyol, and other environmental chemicals. The company is headquartered in Guangzhou, the People's Republic of China.
